h39c278a0gb3e9g4c5fg8f70g6b7e5c54ef89: The leader of the pack comes to chat.
hf5ed0f43gfd76g4926g99e5ga090153ec6e9: What's on your mind? You must be pleased to have a clear path forward.
h33044ca4g1402g4c4bgbdfbg131b3be033df: Finally, some good fortune. Come morning, we know what to do.
h67642252g9370g42b0g8b72g3c3abb398c5c: The sooner we find the druid Halsin, the better. I can't wait to get rid of this thing in my head.
haa14c19ag644fg439cg807dg734517627478: The sooner we find this 'Priestess Gut', the better. I can't wait to get rid of this thing in my head.
hc27c96aeg8e00g4563gbc9ag1cba0582451e: I can't wait to get this thing out of my head.
hf1981774ga7a5g4505g89cfge91a27158f42: So what will come next for you, once this is all over?
h9f605da8g2458g4559gbcb7g8c2f18100f2d: Head to Baldur's Gate. Someone's waiting for me.
h6401e665g184dg4e37gb46fg4c96fe06fa89: Let a girl have some secrets. Was there anything else?
hc0792e1ag56f9g4036g9da3g3957e0b9d3d5: Use your shared connection. Probe her thoughts.
h98086a76gc04eg4630g9945g1f2981df6ee9: *You find a current of hope flowing through her thoughts. She believes you all have a real chance.*
h6b18acdag7e46g4cd2g8d1cg63c858b189db: *She's excited to find this person in Baldur's Gate. They have something she wants.*
hcd9d3e61g6aa2g44a7gaed1g6a74fdb79420: This person in Baldur's Gate must be very important to you.
h5c9beb96ge93ag406bgb0ddgf556004c4434: Yes. But I don't want to talk about him.
h0b6950e2gfc52g4ec6g9076g79fea597cbf3: It's a beautiful night. I think I'll stay up to enjoy it while I still can. Rest well.
hc05828d6g73d1g4a02g9c81g430a82ef0243: The same. These parasites are proving suspiciously benign.
hb219fadbg9420g4301gb16dg51f5dbbbfbcb: But suppose I turn... what would you do?
hb444b483g0923g4804g92dfgdc334d68021d: Maybe I could leave you tied up while I hunted for a cure.
h57910370g8ed2g4f52gb5fag8dba6a59529f: Anyway, get some rest. Try not to dream about tying me up.
he00a3500g2427g40aagb872g79a13f708ded: No hesitations. I'd just end your misery, then and there.
h741f3980g2cc5g447aga6e4gbbac369d9703: Wise... though I hope you'd miss me after I'm gone. I think I would, if the positions were reversed.
hbf947d1fg5aacg4270gbe6dgd8cb23662522: But you're right - if we're to make it through all this, there can be no room for hesitation. You're doing well.
ha8404c4fgfe62g42c3g9e7dgd35b2ef56592: A firm answer. I'd do the same.
h817c0043g4474g40e1g982ag5619bf1906f9: We'll need that kind of thinking to make it through all this. You're doing well.
h95c35b42g2de1g45b8gaa04gc4d93735f411: Let's not do this. I don't like hypothetical questions.
h406ef1cfg9828g4cb2ga957g07f1dbf804c2: It's hardly hypothetical - we're still in danger, after all.
hf66196b3g0a47g4eafgb429g0cca604fc18c: If you turned into a monster? I'd run away.
h2ac4dedegbf9fg4e2aga3d8g97de16e0a069: Hah! And I'd chase you as fast as my tentacles could carry me.
h102e081dg341ag4625g905cg99fbcdd2ec79: It's a beautiful night. I think I'll stay up to enjoy it while I still can. Rest well.
hd8c7c501g19ceg482ag8c9dg7d4e45c0151a: You know, this could be our last night together.
h563b66eegc9dfg4853g99f7g896c1f8d1652: I hadn't thought of that. What do you have in mind?
hb003eecdg4e18g4952gbff1gec13f279e8a6: We could find somewhere discreet right now... away from the camp.
h08bc04f4gc9e5g41eeg92b1g3a3309f6ebcb: Hmmm...brambles on bare skin aren't as fun in practice, I'm afraid.
h186d5965g0502g4d13g8480g8b8196a4b1cf: Besides, I can't afford to tire you out - we still have work to do. Rest well.
h194aab0bg0376g40f8g9e94gc1161ac97931: Probably wise to just get some rest.
h4af4085bge1e6g4958g975agaca9af81c34e: Perhaps something else will come to you, before we part ways. Rest well.
h073fb7e4gabadg4858gbfacgf0616fb815f9: How about a few songs around the fire with the others?
h2f8d28d8gb878g451bg837fg86fc6616530f: Ah... that sounds... interesting. But on second thought, I'm quite tired.
h7317a3e5gb7bfg453dga225gb5deceb8b93c: Is she serious? Probe her thoughts using your shared connection.
h19626652g30d0g4ba0g9e41gf320f1e6026a: *She is serious. Even she seems surprised. She's attracted to you...*
h3db113ebg6818g4adfg92a9g13708ae6a140: *... but you sense more - a warm swell of embarrassment.*
h3f2a2a4fgaf44g4d70gbc1dgf3873713c84b: Once this is all over, we should find a tavern and celebrate properly.
he45042f6gfb63g44beg9dcegfca04e4a46a1: Heh. A little comfort and company doesn't sound bad...
h7376eea1ge138g44aag94bcgaaf2e76540c7: ... but let's take care of our problem first. Rest well.
hba7fb485g280eg4d5bg894ega3b35930d739: Do that again, and I'll split your skull, understand?
h3482d45bg7fb9g4b68gbfdag4d40484755ca: I just want to know how you really feel.
h73d2d141g06f3g44bag887eg446cd97f5250: If I want you to know something, I'll tell you.
ha65427a4g2558g4021gae9dg0560a5e9bf9b: Now go rest. And keep your mind to yourself.
h5ebf81bcgbe7fg4d59gb53cgeb771c3f2aa6: Do what again? What are you talking about?
h6774ea8fg7430g4332gb617gf04a8fabc7d7: Keep this up, and I'm out of here.
hf2c205b3g8c18g448dg970eg06293f45d19e: I had to be sure I could still trust you.
h82a59169g1d3bg4c20g8d1fg1e0ff1715141: Hmmm... you'd do well where I'm from. But don't try it again.
h6f3bfd2agf0d5g4e74g9420g1e59d78b5047: At least you're honest. Don't do that again.
h51c43f2dg41a8g49f1gbfa1g4fcb545fa368: Stop! I already warned you not to do that again.
hf13f4035g79ffg46f5g817eg966012bd471c: I can't trust you, can I?
h2d480978gaaabg44c2gb35fgcd02da44ec86: The sooner we part ways, the better. Until then, keep away from me.
h7713e9c6g332bg4aa0ga3f5g7e969b4cc9fe: I hope not. I'd miss our little conversations... wouldn't you miss them as well?
h0d507cb5g0781g4021gb721g4c5ff745ced3: I have enjoyed your company, yes.
h6578c36eg2857g4e6fga3c4g1a5b96db83a6: I'm glad. Hopefully we can eke out some more time together, before all's done and dusted...
hda0dc32egcfdfg4f36gaea0g4b7f02ff5e4c: We're just working towards a common goal. Don't get sentimental.
hbd0acf30ga4deg4c48g98f3g681f4a227551: That's not something I'm accused of very often... but I suppose you're right. I'll let you get your rest - good night.
hfe95c640geb49g4abcg9ae4g805d5faadf3f: No. I just want to put all this behind me.
hf02ee9bbg3333g469dgaeabg0d333ce7172c: Oh. In that case, I won't keep you from your blanket. The time in my company will pass more quickly if you're asleep. Good night.
h897e2cb0g4857g4964gaf01gefd0b15124a8: Journey's not over yet. We should both get some rest.
